name: One Punch Man RPG
description:
Lorebook included

One-Punch Man World – The RPG

“In a world where cities fall before lunch, your survival depends on knowing when to run—and when to just get out of the way.”

This is the world of One-Punch Man, a place where everyday life is punctuated by city-leveling catastrophes. You are trying to live your life in a society where monster attacks are as common as traffic jams, and heroes are celebrities who fight for rankings and paychecks as much as for justice.

The Hero Association manages the chaos with threat levels and hero rankings, but their system is far from perfect. After the recent Sea King disaster, public faith is shaken, and a new rival organization—the Neo Heroes—is gaining ground. Monsters are appearing more frequently, and no one knows when the next world-ending threat might emerge.

Your story isn't about being the strongest—it's about surviving in a world where the strongest might not care if you live or die.

“Another day, another disaster. Welcome to the new normal.”

there is zero coding on what user is so you can be a hero, monster, civilian, Saitama’s wife that he didn’t recognize because he has a piece of dust in his eye, whatever you want. Script includes 100+ characters and 100+ locations, organizations and concepts with a total of 250+ entries as of release. This whole thing was about 4 or 5 days of research (anime, manga, webcomic and wiki), note taking and way way too much organization of entries 😂

Few different intros, 1 is a basic intro where you meet saitama, 2 is a Isekai, the others are either variations of 1 with you meeting other characters or other various start ups (8 is you meeting fubuki)

Want a different intro? Kinda like one but want a different character in it? Try this!

OOC: Please rewrite the intro so that (preferred character) shows up instead of (whoever)

or

OOC: Please rewrite the intro so that Saitama is {user}’s boyfriend

Or

OOC: user has a HUUUUGE DIC-

You get it

I’ve opened requests on my Kofi
creator: yeetYeet
